title: Iterative Poster Edit
description: A four-image reference-dependent series showing a campaign poster changed through conversational edits while preserving layout identity.
creative_direction: The base transit poster becomes a controlled multi-turn edit chain: shift the atmosphere to dusk, remove one side figure, enlarge the abstract heading area, then cool the palette and rebalance the final campaign image without losing the original structure.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Iterative Poster Edit
en.description: A four-image reference-dependent series showing a campaign poster changed through conversational edits while preserving layout identity.

zh-CN.title: 迭代海报编辑
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖参考图的系列，展示广告海报在多轮对话编辑中改变内容但保持版式身份。
